svg.title: AI crawler proxy architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how an AI crawler request flows through a Cloudflare Worker, bot fingerprint scoring, honeypot detection, cache logic, and render-service endpoints.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What types of AI crawlers hit client domains?')
sendPrompt('What does the Cloudflare Worker proxy-core do?')
sendPrompt('How does the bot fingerprint confidence score work?')
g.text: UA 30 pts · IP 40 pts · PTR 20 pts · Behaviour 10 pts

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the honeypot detection work?')
sendPrompt('What happens when an AI crawler hits a honeypot?')
sendPrompt('How does the proxy distinguish verified bots from humans?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a human visits the proxied site?')
sendPrompt('How does cache hit vs miss work in the bot proxy?')
sendPrompt('What is served on a cache hit for a verified bot?')
sendPrompt('What headers does the proxy add when fetching from origin on cache miss?')
sendPrompt('What does the render-service do and where does it run?')
sendPrompt('How does the /render endpoint use Redis and Puppeteer?')
sendPrompt('What aggregations does the /stats endpoint return?')
sendPrompt('How is Redis used in the render-service?')

svg.text: Click any node to ask about it
